previous_completed_tasks.summary: Audited Uniton_Shared and Uniton_Shared_Live runtime governance and identified gaps preventing AIER Code from acting like an OS.
Created runtime spine state files, source map, freshness policy, public mirror draft, runtime event schema, and read-only inventory script.
Created report-only pre-task gate, receipt schema, contract, and sample ALLOW/WARN/BLOCK receipts.

current_limitations: Current pre-task gate is report-only and non-blocking.
Current gate dry run returns WARN due stale/runtime findings.
Post-task report/state emitter does not exist yet.
Lane queue controller does not exist yet.
Live mirror sync hardening is not implemented yet.
Skill runner is not unified yet.
Health monitor is not unified yet.
Stale runtime surfaces are reported only and are not repaired by this task.
Uniton_Shared_Live is not modified by this task.

next_safe_action_after_this_task.summary: Design a post-task emitter that consumes pre-task receipts and report evidence, then drafts task/ledger/status state without enforcement.

forbidden_actions: Do not change Live branch protection.
Do not fix stale runtime surfaces unless explicitly tasked.
Do not treat chat memory as source of truth.

handoff_summary_for_new_chat.operating_instruction: Read the context pack first, then run the report-only pre-task gate before accepting or starting new Lane_03 runtime governance work.
handoff_summary_for_new_chat.known_state: AIER Code is between Phase 2 and Phase 3. Runtime spine and pre-task gate exist. Post-task emitter is the next safe design task.
